overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-drenched urban commercial district. The player character walks along elevated walkways past large holographic advertisements for 'TENGU' and 'NICOLA', then enters a plaza area with vibrant red and purple lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy elevated pedestrian walkway with metal railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a foggy elevated walkway toward a large commercial building with neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera in the distance near the building entrance

entered.detail: large commercial building with purple 'TENGU' neon signage on the roof
massive white billboard with pink 'NICOLA' text and soda can advertisement
blue metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall vertical pink neon sign extending above the building

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, orange-hued night in a cyberpunk city. The camera walks along an elevated concrete walkway with metal railings, approaching a large commercial building adorned with bright neon signs for 'TENGU' and 'NICOLA'. The atmosphere is thick with fog, diffusing the neon lights. A distant pedestrian is visible walking toward the camera near the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under large digital billboard with purple lighting

events.description: enters covered area under the building overhang with vibrant purple and cyan neon lighting
lighting shifts from orange foggy atmosphere to intense purple neon under the canopy

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang past the large NICOLA advertisement wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the NICOLA billboard

entered.detail: illuminated ceiling structure with shifting purple and cyan neon lights
pair of vending machines with glowing screens next to the billboard

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a large overhang, entering a semi-covered walkway illuminated by vibrant purple and cyan neon lights from the ceiling. The massive NICOLA billboard now dominates the left side as the camera passes by. A pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. The foggy atmosphere gives way to clearer, artificially lit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial passage with pawnshop and food vendor stalls

events.description: passes yellow pawnshop booth and approaches teal-lit food stall area

agents.ego_description: walking past a pawnshop booth and food vendor stall while navigating the narrow passage

notable_agents.action: person standing at the pawnshop counter interacting with the vendor
vendor working at the food stall under teal neon lights

entered.detail: yellow and green booth with illuminated 'PAWNSHOP' signage on top
open-air food vendor stall with bright teal neon tube lighting
large spiky red neon sign resembling a palm tree on the building ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrower passage featuring commercial vendor stalls. On the right, a yellow pawnshop booth with green trim and illuminated signage is visible, while on the left, a food stall glows with teal neon lights. A vendor works at the stall and a customer stands at the pawnshop. The environment transitions from the purple-lit canopy to a more enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and large red-lit industrial building facade

events.description: exits narrow passage through a teal metal gate into a wide open plaza
environment becomes dominated by intense red and purple neon from the large building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through a gate into a spacious plaza and approaching a large building with dramatic red neon lighting, navigating through scattered pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and standing in the plaza area

entered.detail: massive industrial building with intense red and purple neon lighting and metal walkways
tall palm tree standing in the center of the plaza
wide open tiled plaza area with yellow safety lines

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a teal metal gate into a wide, open plaza. The space opens up dramatically, revealing a large industrial building on the right bathed in intense red and purple neon light. A palm tree stands in the center of the plaza, and several pedestrians are scattered throughout the area walking in various directions. The atmosphere shifts from enclosed commercial passage to expansive urban plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy cyberpunk district that transitions from a hazy elevated walkway into a vibrant, open-air plaza. It begins on a concrete path under an orange-hued night, moving through thick fog toward glowing neon signs for TENGU and NICOLA. As the camera passes under a large overhang, the atmosphere clears and the lighting shifts to vibrant purple and cyan tones beneath a massive NICOLA billboard. The scene then narrows into a commercial corridor lined with a teal-lit food stall and a yellow pawnshop booth before passing through a metal gate. Finally, the environment opens dramatically into a wide plaza where a central palm tree stands before a large industrial building bathed in intense red and purple neon light.
